text: I am thine, save me, O Lord.
author: Psalm 118:94

text: Be who you are and be that well.
author: St. Francis de Sales

text: In the evening of life we will be judged on love.
author: St. John of the Cross

text: Prayer is nothing else than an intimate sharing between friends.
author: St. Teresa of Avila

text: Our hearts are restless until they rest in Thee.
author: St. Augustine

text: Holiness consists simply in doing God's will, and being what God wants us to be.
author: St. Thérèse of Lisieux

text: Prefer nothing to the love of Christ, and never suffer anything to interfere with His love.
author: St. Benedict

text: To be deep in history is to cease to be Protestant.
author: Blessed John Henry Newman
source: Essay on the Development of Christian Doctrine

text: But as for this, that when John had heard in the prison the works of Christ, he sent two of his disciples Matth. xi. 2; this is the Law sending to the Gospel. For John here was a figu[...]
author: St. Augustine
